description: Multiple SYN packets to different destination ports from 192.168.1.10 within a short period.
recommended_action: Investigate source IP 192.168.1.10 for malicious scanning activity. Consider blocking the source IP.

description: ARP response from 192.168.1.1 with a MAC address that does not match known records for this IP.
recommended_action: Isolate the suspected host 192.168.1.1. Verify ARP tables. Implement static ARP entries.

alert_type: DNS Flood / Abnormal DNS Request Volume
description: Unusually high volume of DNS queries from 192.168.1.10 to 8.8.8.8 within a short period.
recommended_action: Investigate the source host 192.168.1.10 for malware or misconfiguration. Implement DNS rate limiting.
